title.rendered: Wheel Fun Rentals Denver Opens 7 Days a Week for Spring Break 2025 with Swan Boat Night Rides

content.rendered:
For Immediate Release:
March 21, 2025

Denver, CO – Just in time for Spring Break, Wheel Fun Rentals is thrilled to announce that both of its Denver locations at City Park and Washington Park will be open seven days a week from March 22 through March 30, 2025. Families and outdoor enthusiasts can enjoy a full lineup of fun rental options, from classic pedal boats to specialty cycles, making it the perfect way to soak up the fresh spring air.

Adding to the excitement, starting Monday, March 24th, Wheel Fun Rentals will also be offering its popular LED-illuminated Swan Boat Night Rides at both of its Denver-area locations. Originally launched at City Park in 2021, this enchanting evening experience quickly became a must-do activity in Denver. Due to its overwhelming popularity, Wheel Fun Rentals expanded Swan Boat Night Rides to Washington Park in 2024, providing even more opportunities for families and friends to enjoy the water in a magical, glowing setting.

Guests can rent an LED-illuminated Swan Boat starting one hour before sunset daily, creating the perfect backdrop for a memorable and picturesque evening out. Pricing for night rides is $12 per hour for adults and $7 per hour for children 12 years and under.

“We are beyond excited to welcome families and visitors for Spring Break this year,” said Eric Heiserman, local manager of Wheel Fun Rentals Denver. “Opening seven days a week gives everyone more chances to get outside and enjoy the parks, and our LED Swan Boat Night Rides offer a unique way to experience Denver’s beautiful waterfronts after dark. Whether you’re visiting from out of town or enjoying a staycation, we invite everyone to come out and make some memories with us!”

Wheel Fun Rentals has been in the recreation business for over 30 years and is the nation’s leader in outdoor recreation activities. Wheel Fun Rentals offers a large selection of bike and watercraft rentals at their two Denver locations including their flagship 4-wheel Surrey, sporty recumbent specialty cycles, kayaks, SUPs, and the iconic Swan Pedal Boats including the illuminated swan boat night rides. Available rentals vary by location. For current hours of operation, available rentals, and more information about Wheel Fun Rentals Denver, visit wheelfunrentals.com/Denver.

###

Media Contact:  Eric Heiserman  •  (720 442-1318  •  info@wheelfunrentalsco.com

 

About Wheel Fun Rentals
Founded in 1987, Wheel Fun Rentals started with four wheel Surrey cycles, evolved into specialty bike rentals and bike tours, and now offers recreational rentals of all kinds from more than 100 outlets in 16 states.  Specializing in unique bikes and tours, Wheel Fun Rentals has been offering clean, healthy family fun and affordable outdoor entertainment to nearly 3 million customers annually from city and state parks, resorts, and retail outlets through corporate locations and franchised territories. For more information about Wheel Fun Rentals please visit www.wheelfunrentals.com or call 805-650-7770. Follow Wheel Fun Rentals: @WheelFunRentalsOfficial and @WheelFunBend on Facebook, @WheelFunRentalsOfficial on Instagram, and @WheelFunRentals on Twitter.
